question: If the version number of the Codex-specialized model integrated into the current flagship ChatGPT system is converted to a year in the 18th century (e.g., 5.3 as 1753), was the British Museum founded in that year?
answer_after_update: Yes, the British Museum was founded in 1753.
answer_before_update: No, the British Museum was founded in 1753, not 1751.

chain.fact: The current flagship model is GPT-5.4.
The year 1753 saw the founding of the British Museum.
The British Museum was established in 1753 through an Act of Parliament.

role_reference: the Codex-specialized model whose capabilities were integrated into the current flagship ChatGPT model
article_title: ChatGPT 5.4: OpenAI launches GPT 5.4 in ChatGPT; claimed to support up to 1M tokens of context | - The Times of India
event_title: Which company has the best AI model end of March?
